title: Industrial Reborn | Age of Machines
description: An industrial journey with Create and advanced tech!
body:
# Industrial Reborn | Age of Machines

**Welcome to Industrial Reborn!**  
A world where creativity meets the power of automation.

This modpack is built **around the Create mod** as its core, bringing a unique experience focused on **engineering, factory building, and mechanical automation**. Carefully selected tech-based addons expand the possibilities, without relying on magic or overcomplicated systems.

## ⚙️ Key Features:
- 🔩 Core gameplay based on the **Create** mod and its addons
- 🏭 Expanded industrial progression with compatible tech mods
- ⛏️ Balanced world generation and natural progression
- 🌍 Optimized for exploration, automation, and efficient building
- 🧱 Designed for builders, engineers, and logic lovers

## 📦 Who is this modpack for?
If you enjoy crafting machines, designing automated systems, and building beautiful steampunk-inspired contraptions, this modpack is made for you.  
No magic. No distractions. Just gears, steam, and pure mechanical logic.

> Enter a world powered by gears — the Age of Machines has begun.

---

👤 **Created by [@eo_souzz4d_](https://instagram.com/eo_souzz4d_)**  
🎮 Built for Minecraft Java **1.20.1**  
🧱 Runs on **Fabric Loader**
